content:
啊啊啊啊校貓我愛你<:takenotes:1357186646294138890> 
~~我從未詆毀＿＿~~ 我會努力活着的，也祝忘卻前夜和腦缸組的大家永遠不死<:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184> 加油啊，一定要成為~~我連周邊都買不起的~~大ip啊，~~有錢的話~~我會努力課金的<:pray:1356053116260454534> 等我學會寫文以外的生同人作品出來的方式，我一定要在第N年的新春會上讓貓你刷爆信用卡<:point:1356053112292511815>
貓貓加油，真的很喜歡這遊戲

1. Roughly around mid december last year, during the second anniversary. A dear friend introduced me to the game and because I had nothing else to do, I decided to take a look and couldn’t be happier that I did. Morimens manages to scratch an itch that so far only one other game has managed to scratch, that being Bloodborne, and it brings me joy every day.
2. There are so many, it’s hard to chose just one. So I’ll chose two! I hardly cry when it comes to fiction and stories, but the ends of chapter 1 and 2 made me tear up a lot. The childlike artstyle used for the end of chapter 1 really enhanced the tragedy of the story. It felt like I was watching the events through Aigis’ eyes. The dread I felt during the finale of chapter 2, watching Jenkin crawl through the vents while slowly fading away, is one I will never forget, in a positive way.
3. Imagine a tiny cat trying to push it’s paws under your door, begging for more stories. That’s me, the first thing I always go for when a new version drops is the story because I know it will be amazing.
4. With a lot of games, I’m very curious about behind the scenes stories. From concept art to story ideas and titbits of the development. Unfortunately, not a lot of studios share these things, which makes it feel even more special when the team does share these things. This look into Lady Xu’s development over the years made her all the more endearing to me, and it makes me even more curious about other characters. There are a lot of characters I’d love to learn more about, but if I had to pick a pair, it would be Castor and Pollux.
5. Firstly, a happy lunar new year to everyone, enjoy the small break before coming back to work! Secondly, I want everyone to know that you truly made something special with this game. I was in a pretty bad place with my art, but ever since I started playing Morimens, it motivated me to continue drawing and writing. It has been less than three months but this game holds a special place in my heart.
猫猫，那些唤醒体的生日，有些没有准确的日子，是怎么定下来的？
